sql_array: CREATE TABLE test_dates (id Int32, date_str String, nullable_date Date32, value Nullable(Int32));

INSERT INTO test_dates (id, date_str, nullable_date, value) VALUES (1, '20200912', YYYYMMDDToDate32(20200912), NULL), (2, '20230101', YYYYMMDDToDate32(20230101), 100), (3, '20201231', YYYYMMDDToDate32(20201231), 200), (4, '', NULL, NULL);
SELECT id, YYYYMMDDToDate32(CAST(date_str AS Int32)) AS converted_date, value IS NULL AS value_null FROM test_dates WHERE nullable_date IS NULL;
SELECT id FROM (SELECT id, NULL AS temp_value FROM test_dates) AS subquery WHERE temp_value IS NULL;
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM test_dates GROUP BY YYYYMMDDToDate32(CAST(date_str AS Int32)) HAVING value IS NULL;
SELECT id, value, YYYYMMDDToDate32(date_str) AS converted_date FROM (SELECT id, date_str, value FROM test_dates WHERE value IS NOT NULL) WHERE converted_date IS NOT NULL;

WITH (SELECT MAX(value) FROM test_dates WHERE value IS NOT NULL) AS max_value SELECT id, value IS NULL, YYYYMMDDToDate32(CASE WHEN value > max_value THEN 20230101 ELSE 20201231 END) AS conditional_date FROM test_dates;
CREATE TABLE temp_dates AS SELECT * FROM test_dates WHERE value IS NOT NULL;
SELECT EXISTS(SELECT 1 FROM temp_dates WHERE nullable_date IS NULL) AS has_nulls;
SELECT id, YYYYMMDDToDate32(CAST(date_str AS Int32)), nullable_date IS NULL AS date_is_null FROM test_dates WHERE nullable_date IS NOT NULL ORDER BY date_str;
